MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,923.01 FILED BY CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIEGO, SABRINA SAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE REPRESENTED BY SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER ANGELA COOPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SABRINA SAN DIEGO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIEGO, SABRINA SAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
